title: Primary care follow-up
text: Patient seen for routine follow-up of osteoarthritis. Reports adherence to the current care plan. Plan: continue current management and recheck in three months.

title: Comprehensive metabolic panel
text: Comprehensive metabolic panel collected at the morning draw. Indication: monitoring for osteoarthritis. All analytes within the laboratory reference intervals.

title: Specialist consultation
text: Consultation requested for ongoing osteoarthritis. History reviewed with the patient in clinic today. Impression discussed; follow-up arranged with the referring provider.

title: Chest X-ray report
text: Two-view chest radiograph obtained. Indication: baseline imaging in the context of osteoarthritis. No acute cardiopulmonary findings.

title: Medication review
text: Medication list reconciled during today's visit. No adverse effects reported for current osteoarthritis therapy. Refills issued for ninety days.

title: Lipid panel
text: Fasting lipid panel processed. Indication: cardiovascular risk assessment alongside osteoarthritis. Values compared against the prior result on file.

title: Telehealth check-in
text: Brief telehealth visit completed for osteoarthritis monitoring. Patient had no new concerns during the call. Next in-person visit confirmed.

title: Dermatology consultation
text: Evaluation of a stable, longstanding skin finding. No change in appearance reported.
